content.rendered:
Step into the heart of India with a journey through the Golden Triangle – Delhi, Agra, and Jaipur. This classic Indian tour combines rich history, stunning architecture, and vibrant culture in three of India’s most iconic cities.

Delhi – The Capital City
Start your adventure in Delhi, a city that seamlessly blends ancient heritage with modernity. Visit the majestic Red Fort, explore the intricate beauty of Jama Masjid, and discover the serene Qutub Minar. Don’t miss a visit to the India Gate and Lotus Temple for a true taste of Delhi’s charm.

Agra – The City of Love
Next, travel to Agra, home to the magnificent Taj Mahal, a symbol of eternal love. Explore the historic Agra Fort, and visit the serene Mehtab Bagh for stunning views of the Taj Mahal. Agra’s rich Mughal history and architecture will leave you in awe.

Jaipur – The Pink City
End your journey in the royal city of Jaipur, where the grandeur of Rajasthan comes alive. Visit the stunning Amber Fort, the iconic Hawa Mahal, and the intricate City Palace. Explore the bustling Johari Bazaar and indulge in local crafts and cuisine.

Delhi – The Capital CityStart your adventure in Delhi, a city that seamlessly blends ancient heritage with modernity….

description:
Golden Triangle: Delhi – Agra – Jaipur
Discover the essence of India with the famous Golden Triangle circuit, covering the cultural gems of Delhi, Agra, and Jaipur. Begin in Delhi, where the charm of Old Delhi’s bustling bazaars and Mughal monuments blends with the elegance of New Delhi’s grand avenues and modern landmarks. Continue to Agra, home to the eternal symbol of love, the Taj Mahal, along with the majestic Agra Fort and the heritage city of Fatehpur Sikri. Conclude in the royal city of Jaipur, the Pink City, where magnificent forts like Amber Fort, palaces such as City Palace and Hawa Mahal, and colorful local markets bring Rajasthan’s royal heritage alive. The Golden Triangle is the perfect journey for first-time travelers to India, offering a blend of history, architecture, culture, and vibrant traditions.

faqs.title: 1. What are the main highlights of this trip?
faqs.content: Delhi: Red Fort, Qutub Minar, Humayun’s Tomb, India Gate, Rajpath, Lotus Temple, Chandni Chowk Agra: Taj Mahal, Agra Fort, Fatehpur Sikri Jaipur: Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar, local bazaars

faqs.title: 2. What is the best time to visit the Golden Triangle?
faqs.content: Oct–March: Best season with pleasant weather for sightseeing Summers (Apr–June) are hot; Monsoon (Jul–Sep) is moderate with fewer tourists

faqs.title: 3. How many days are ideal for this trip?
faqs.content: A standard Golden Triangle tour takes 5N/6D or 6N/7D, but it can be customized as per your time.

faqs.title: 4. Is the trip suitable for families and kids?
faqs.content: Yes, this is a family-friendly itinerary. Kids enjoy forts, palaces, and vibrant markets.
